mapper.select: SELECT followeeId FROM follow WHERE followerId = #{followerId} ORDER BY createTime DESC, id DESC
SELECT followerId FROM follow WHERE followeeId = #{followeeId} ORDER BY createTime DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE followerId = #{followerId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE followeeId = #{followeeId}

sql.if: AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.userAccount LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.userAccount LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow f INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = f.followeeId WHERE f.followerId = #{followerId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow f INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = f.followerId WHERE f.followeeId = #{followeeId}
